input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.10.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.10.2
            TITLE: disabled vehicles will be cleared from the track by the track workers.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.10.2: Disabled vehicles will be cleared from the track by the track workers.
D.3.10.2 Disabled vehicles will be cleared from the track by the track workers.

final_answer: Disabled vehicles will be cleared from the track by the track workers.
